findings.description: Large water-filled depression visible in the road surface at the intersection of the curb and street. The pooled water indicates a significant depression/pothole where asphalt has failed. Visible cracking patterns extend from the water-filled area showing road deterioration with broken edges along the curb line.

Large water-filled depression/pooling visible in the center-right of the roadway extending along the road. The water accumulation indicates a depression in the road surface where proper drainage is compromised. The edges show deterioration where the road surface meets the curb/edge, with visible broken edges and uneven surface suggesting subsurface damage.
